title: Fix PriceTable alignment and full Vietnamese translation
Optimize app for Supabase curated views
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: the app already persists VN and world market data into Supabase, but parts of the backend/frontend may still shape responses from legacy services or reconstruct aggregates in application code. Review the current read paths, switch them to use curated views and direct Supabase-backed payloads where appropriate, and verify the web UI renders correctly from the curated layer.
notes: Reviewed the frontend/backend data flow and tightened it around the Supabase curated layer. VN summaries still use latest_observation_details for row-level detail retention (especially rice varieties), but now derive aggregate signals from daily_price_summary and commodity_trends instead of relying on raw_payload previousPrice. World responses now expose curated metadata (status, sourceMode, lastUpdated) and pass through priceVndKg from latest_world_prices_public so the frontend no longer guesses VND conversions client-side. Updated the world page/table to use server-provided categories, status, timestamps, and VND/kg reference pricing. Verified with server typecheck, lint, build, and a smoke test returning live curated data for both VN and world endpoints.

title: Replace broken world price source
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: the current world price ingestion relies on a World Bank Pink Sheet XLSX URL that now returns 404. Replace it with a stable official source, adapt parsing if needed, and verify Supabase world price sync continues to populate curated views.
notes: Replaced the broken World Bank Pink Sheet source with current official World Bank document URLs and a fallback official URL. Rewrote the parser to read the Monthly Prices sheet using actual header rows instead of relying on generic __EMPTY_* keys. Verified the service now parses 24 live commodities from the workbook, merges to 29 total items with fallback coverage, updates Supabase world_prices successfully, and passes lint/build/typecheck.

title: Apply Supabase migrations to hosted project and add service role env
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nThe codebase now includes Supabase CLI migrations and Supabase-aware ingestion/read paths, but the current local environment only has public keys. Link the hosted Supabase project, add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY securely to the runtime environment, run migrations on the hosted project, and verify VN/world data flows are reading from the new curated views instead of legacy fallback paths.
notes: Hosted project linked successfully via Supabase CLI using a valid Personal Access Token. Applied migration 20260501150000_agri_data_model.sql and supabase/seed.sql to project cdbjmixdfnvmauufonvz (Singapore). Verified seeded lookup tables exist (33 commodities, 37 provinces). Verified live sync path populates Supabase successfully: price_observations=144, raw_crawl_logs=10, daily_price_summary=46, world_prices=29, latest_world_prices_public=29. Smoke test confirms VN/world service responses are returned while data is now persisted in Supabase; world sync currently falls back to bundled static data because the upstream World Bank Pink Sheet URL returns HTTP 404.

title: Migrate app data flow to Supabase curated model
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nImplement Supabase CLI migrations and seed data based on data-model-supabase-prompt.md, replace file-cache based VN/world price flows with server-side Supabase ingestion and curated read APIs, and remove the current marketplace listing UI while preserving future crowdsource-related schema.

title: Improve color contrast and remove commodity abbreviations
Implement unresolved VN prices dashboard plan
description: Why: implementation_plan.md.resolved describes a dual-source VN agricultural price dashboard, but the current project still serves only world prices and the homepage still uses mock data. What: implement the missing server crawlers/aggregation/history APIs and wire the homepage components to the new /api/vn-prices flow with expandable regional pricing.

title: Complete ingestion validation pipeline
description: Implement the remaining ingestion-validation workflow from the prompt in the existing TypeScript/Supabase server. Current repo already has direct Supabase sync and partial normalization/bounds logic, but is missing freshness checks, duplicate detection against DB, spike detection, queue/worker processing, and monitoring. Add the missing pipeline pieces in repo style and verify with targeted checks.
design: Reuse existing crawler and Supabase abstractions, implement pipeline in TypeScript rather than introducing Python, keep legacy fallback paths intact.
acceptance_criteria: Server includes a reusable ingestion pipeline with bounds, freshness, duplicate, spike, and confidence handling; crawlers enqueue raw messages when admin Supabase is configured; worker consumes queue and writes observations/errors; monitoring script reports queue depth/errors/recent records; lint/build succeed.

title: Remove unused navigation tabs
description: Remove 'Thị trường' and 'Phân tích' tabs from Navbar and Footer as they are currently unused.

title: Fix world category mojibake and Supabase RLS hardening
description: Fix the mojibake literal in the world prices category filter and harden the Supabase migration RLS/security-definer setup after review.
close_reason: Fixed world category mojibake and hardened Supabase RLS/function/view security; build and lint pass, Supabase reset blocked by missing Docker.

title: Connect Vite marketplace to Supabase using env keys
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:\nThe project has Supabase credentials in .env but the Vite client is not connected and marketplace data is still mocked. Implement a Supabase client using the existing env values and wire the marketplace listing read/write flow to Supabase with safe client-side configuration.

title: Improve mobile portrait usability for VN dashboard
description: Why: the user needs the dashboard verified on phone portrait layout, with key actions positioned closer to thumb reach and the interface remaining usable on both desktop and mobile. What: audit the current responsive behavior, reproduce issues at mobile viewport sizes, adjust layout and action placement, then verify the updated UI in portrait mode and desktop mode.

title: Fix NaN change values breaking TopMovers runtime
description: Why: headless browser verification of the VN dashboard found a runtime crash in TopMovers because some crawled rows use '-' for change values, which currently parse to NaN and later serialize to null in the API response. What: sanitize crawler change parsing and harden summary aggregation so live payloads always emit finite numeric change fields.

title: Harden secondary coffee source when giacaphe blocks crawler
description: Why: the VN prices implementation is live, but giacaphe.com currently returns a Cloudflare challenge to server-side requests, so the secondary source remains unavailable in production-like verification. What: evaluate an alternate secondary coffee source or a compliant fetch strategy, then restore true dual-source comparison for coffee regions.

title: Configure automatic GitHub sync workflow
description: Why: the repository currently has no git remote or auto-publish workflow. What: connect this repo to the requested GitHub repository, add a safe auto-push workflow for committed changes, and document a manual sync path for full add/commit/push publishing.

title: Add end-to-end ingestion test script
description: Add a small non-interactive script that enqueues sample VN price messages into the ingestion Redis stream so the new worker pipeline can be verified locally end-to-end. Document how to run it with the worker and monitor.
design: Keep it in the server TypeScript workspace and reuse existing queue/message types rather than introducing a separate toolchain.
acceptance_criteria: Repo includes a script that pushes at least one valid sample message to price:raw, supports predictable local verification, and README explains the worker/test/monitor flow.

title: Validate Supabase hardening migration with local Docker stack
description: Run npm run supabase:reset or equivalent migration validation once Docker Desktop is available; current environment cannot reach dockerDesktopLinuxEngine.

title: Extend Congthuong coverage beyond coffee and heo hoi
description: Why: congthuong.vn is now integrated as a trusted validation source, but the first implementation only covers coffee and live pig prices because those article formats are stable enough to parse reliably. What: evaluate current congthuong.vn article structure for pepper and domestic rice, then add parsers if the content remains consistently machine-readable without introducing fragile scraping logic.
